BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"2. I get very little pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"3. It's hard to get interested in anything.","Q12":"0. I make decisions about as well as ever.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"2. I don't have enough energy to do very much.","Q16":"2-. I sleep a lot less than usual.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"3. I am too tired or fatigued to do a most of the things I used to do.","Q21":"3. I have lost interest in sex completely."}
